title: Botrychium minus
intro: Botrychium minus, also known as small rattlesnake fern or lesser lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Ophioglossaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Botrychium minus include furostanol saponins, alkaloids, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal preparations, Botrychium minus is often combined with other plants to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, such as a combination with yarrow and plantain to treat fever and inflammation.

In some cultures, a tea made from the plant is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs.
